samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse detection module. Detects rising edges of data_in and generates a pulse signal data_out when a pulse is detected.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Implement pulse detection logic based on the input data_in and generate a pulse signal data_out when a pulse is detected. The pulse is generated when data_in transitions from 0 to 1 to 0 (3 cycles). The data_out signal indicates the end of the pulse and resets to 0 after the pulse ends.</implementation>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="state" width="3" type="reg" description="State variable for pulse detection." />
        <always sensitivity="posedge clk or negedge rst_n">
            <if condition="!rst_n">
                <assign state = 3'b000;
                <assign data_out = 1'b0;
            </if>
            <else>
                <case state>
                    3'b000: begin
                        <if condition="data_in == 1'b1">
                            <assign state = 3'b001;
                        </if>
                    </case>
                    3'b001: begin
                        <if condition="data_in == 1'b0">
                            <assign state = 3'b010;
                        </if>
                    </case>
                    3'b010: begin
                        <if condition="data_in == 1'b1">
                            <assign state = 3'b011;
                        </if>
                    </case>
                    3'b011: begin
                        <if condition="data_in == 1'b0">
                            <assign state = 3'b100;
                        </if>
                    </case>
                    3'b100: begin
                        <if condition="data_in == 1'b1">
                            <assign state = 3'b101;
                        </if>
                    </case>
                    3'b101: begin
                        <if condition="data_in == 1'b0">
                            <assign state = 3'b000;
                            <assign data_out = 1'b1;
                        </if>
                    </case>
                    default: begin
                        <assign state = 3'b000;
                        <assign data_out = 1'b0;
                    </default>
                </case>
            </else>
        </always>
    </logic_description>
</module>
